overview.summary: Sorting rearranges data so later queries and scans become easier.
overview.interviewRelevance: This topic appears regularly in coding interviews.

paragraphs: Sorting Algorithms shows up in practical systems whenever we need to organize or process data efficiently.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: Sorting Algorithms becomes easier once you stop memorizing and start tracking the invariant.

definition.technicalDefinition: Sorting Algorithms is a core DSA topic with a reusable set of mental models and tradeoffs.

vocabulary.definition: The condition that remains true as the algorithm runs.
The pieces of information that must be tracked at runtime.

keyProperties: Understand the shape of the data.
Understand the cost of the main operation.
